summary: Restored missing editor tools to the top toolbar and consolidated project actions (Save, Export, Share) into organized dropdown menus to improve visibility and user experience.

plan.title: Create ToolSelector Component
plan.description: Extract the drawing and object addition tools (Select, Draw, Text, Image, Icons, Auto-numbering) from the sidebar ObjectToolbar into a new ToolSelector component.

plan.title: Integrate Tools into Top Bar
plan.description: Add the newly created ToolSelector to the main Toolbar component to restore the tools to the upper part of the screen.

plan.title: Consolidate Project Actions
plan.description: Refactor ProjectActions.tsx to group the 'Save' button, 'Export' options (PDF and Project Files), and 'More' options (Share, Open, Settings) into prominent dropdown menus using Shadcn UI.

plan.title: Cleanup Sidebar
plan.description: Remove the ObjectToolbar component from the Home page layout and delete its file, as its functionality has been moved to the top bar.

acceptance_criteria.description: Tools (Draw, Text, Icons) are visible in the top Toolbar component
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx for the inclusion of <ToolSelector />

acceptance_criteria.description: Export actions are grouped under a DropdownMenu
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ProjectActions.tsx for DropdownMenu containing handleFlattenAndDownload and handleExportProject

acceptance_criteria.description: ObjectToolbar is completely removed from the project
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify client/src/components/editor/ObjectToolbar.tsx does not exist and is not imported in client/src/pages/home.tsx
Run npm run check and ensure 0 errors

risks: Dropdown menus might overflow or clip if the window is too narrow, though flex wrapping should mitigate this.
Users accustomed to the sidebar tools might temporarily be confused by the move back to the top bar.
